description: Create a physical security floor plan in EdrawMax for a 6m x 4m server room with a single door. The plan must include a title 'Server Room Security Layout' at the top. Place and label the following devices: a Card Reader outside the door ('CR-01'), a Push-to-Exit button inside ('REX-01'), a Door Contact on the door ('DC-01'), a Dome Camera in a corner viewing the entrance ('CAM-01'), a Dome Camera in the opposite corner ('CAM-02'), a Motion Detector/PIR in the center ('PIR-01'), a Glass Break Sensor on the wall ('GB-01'), and a Control Panel on the wall ('ACP-01'). Save the source file as /home/ga/Diagrams/security_plan.eddx and export an image as /home/ga/Diagrams/security_plan.png.
